description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-popover` (T2-08) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, placement typed (top/bottom/left/right + start/end), trigger typed (click/hover/focus), open prop typed
2. Accessibility — `role="dialog"` if interactive content, focus management (trap if modal-like), Escape closes, trigger aria-expanded, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all placements, all trigger types, Escape close, click-outside close, focus management, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all placements, interactive content demo, trigger types
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, arrow/caret positioning, CSS parts (content, arrow)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, uses Popover API or Floating UI
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-popover/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-popover — T2-08 antagonistic quality review
